description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 5

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 30

Components: C, Mob, S

You instantly relocate to a location within range, using the same rules as Mugen Ugoku no Jutsu (p184). You may, at your choice, leave an afterimage that remains completely still, which disappears on your next turn. If you arrive at a square adjacent to another creature, but outside of its line of sight, you can make a Hide check even without cover, which will not hide you from creatures that have an unobscured line of sight to you.

Avoiding an Attack (1/day): Minimum DC 31. This technique may also be used to avoid a technique that allows a Reflex save for half or no damage. Using the technique this way increases the Cost to 9. If you succeed, you may use the technique as normal, though its range is halved.

The effective Kawarimi Defense of an attack is lowered by 1 when determining if you can use Shunzeki to avoid an attack. There is no maximum CR.

Mastery: Each step allows you to use the technique to avoid an attack an additional time per day.
